text: 🇮🇷 Sayyed Mojtaba Hosseini Khamenei: — In the name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful. The news of the martyrdom of the prominent professor in the fields of science and culture, and the veteran figure in the field of foreign policy, Dr. Sayyed Kamal Kharrazi, was a badge of honor for the academic community, university professors, and political officials in the Islamic Republic system, and conversely, a mark of shame indicating the baseness of the arrogant american-zionist powers and enemies of science, culture, and Iranian civilization. The deceased spent many years of his life in the service of various cultural and media fields, and in bearing the responsibility of the Ministry of Foreign Affairs. He also undertook a role in the Strategic Council on Foreign Relations, alongside his activity in the fields of modern cognitive sciences. As I offer my condolences and congratulations on the martyrdom of this dedicated figure and his honorable wife to the general public, the academic community, the lovers of this professor and his students, as well as the honorable Kharrazi family, especially His Eminence Ayatollah Sayyed Mohsen Kharrazi, I ask the Almighty Allah to grant them high ranks. Sayyed Mojtaba Hosseini Khamenei | 11/04/2026
text_zh: 🇮🇷 赛义德·穆杰塔巴·侯赛尼·哈梅内伊：——奉至仁至慈的真主之名。杰出的科学文化教授、资深外交政策人物赛义德·卡迈勒·哈拉齐博士殉难的消息，对于伊斯兰共和国体制的学术界、大学教授和政治官员来说是一枚荣誉勋章，反之，这标志着傲慢的美国-犹太复国主义势力以及科学、文化和伊朗文明敌人的卑劣。逝者一生中多年服务于各种文化和媒体领域，并承担了外交部的责任。除了在现代认知科学领域的活动外，他还曾在外交关系战略委员会担任职务。在向公众、学术界、这位教授的爱戴者和学生，以及尊贵的哈拉齐家族，特别是赛义德·穆赫辛·哈拉齐大阿亚图拉，就这位敬业人士及其尊贵夫人的殉难表示哀悼和祝贺之际，我祈求全能的真主赐予他们崇高的地位。赛义德·穆杰塔巴·侯赛尼·哈梅内伊 | 2026年4月11日

text: NEW: After a call with Trump, Netanyahu changed Israel’s strike policy in Lebanon. From now on, every strike in Beirut requires special approvals — including Netanyahu’s personal sign-off. An Israeli official says there is no ceasefire, but attacks have been significantly reduced and are now under tighter political restrictions. Source: KAN
text_zh: 最新消息：在与特朗普通话后，内塔尼亚胡改变了以色列在黎巴嫩的打击政策。从现在起，贝鲁特的每一次打击都需要特别批准——包括内塔尼亚胡的个人签字。一位以色列官员表示，目前没有停火，但袭击已大幅减少，现在受到更严格的政治限制。来源：KAN

text: Ukrainian kamikaze drones hit Russia’s Rakushnoye and Yuri Korchagin drilling platforms in the Caspian Sea, over 1,000 km from the front line. The drones were guided via Starlink. Despite light air-defense systems on the platforms, the attack was not repelled.
text_zh: 乌克兰神风特攻队无人机袭击了俄罗斯在里海的Rakushnoye和Yuri Korchagin钻井平台，距离前线超过1000公里。无人机通过星链（Starlink）进行引导。尽管平台上有轻型防空系统，但袭击并未被击退。

text: Open Source Intel Lebanese political figures opposed to Hezbollah are calling on the Beirut government to open peace negotiations with Israel, according to the Lebanese newspaper Nidaa al-Watan. The officials called for a small negotiating delegation free from sectarian constraints, a unilateral ceasefire declaration to Hezbollah with a short timeline for disarmament, and outreach to Arab states and the Vatican to build diplomatic support. A Lebanese official told the paper the government is the only body authorized to negotiate with Israel and said Lebanon should "copy the Pakistani model", demand a limited ceasefire and begin talks immediately after it takes effect. The paper also reports that negotiations between U.S., Israeli, and Lebanese ambassadors will begin Tuesday in Washington, with follow-up talks expected in Cyprus. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：据黎巴嫩《祖国报》报道，反对真主党的黎巴嫩政治人物呼吁贝鲁特政府与以色列开启和平谈判。官员们呼吁建立一个不受宗派限制的小型谈判代表团，向真主党宣布单方面停火并设定短期解除武装的时间表，并与阿拉伯国家和梵蒂冈接触以建立外交支持。一位黎巴嫩官员告诉该报，政府是唯一有权与以色列谈判的机构，并表示黎巴嫩应该“复制巴基斯坦模式”，要求有限停火并在停火生效后立即开始会谈。该报还报道称，美国、以色列和黎巴嫩大使之间的谈判将于周二在华盛顿开始，后续会谈预计将在塞浦路斯进行。推文

text: ✝ Kataeb MP Salim Sayegh on Israeli attacks on civilians: "Deliberate airstrikes!"
text_zh: ✝ 长枪党议员萨利姆·萨耶格谈以色列对平民的袭击：“蓄意空袭！”

text: ⚡️ 🇰🇼 🇮🇷 The Kuwaiti Ministry of Defence announced that its forces engaged seven hostile drones inside Kuwaiti airspace over the past 24 hours. They added that Iranian aggression also targeted several vital facilities belonging to the National Guard, injuring a number of its personnel. Their condition is stable. Serious material damage was caused. Explosive ordnance disposal teams handled 14 reports. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇰🇼 🇮🇷 科威特国防部宣布，其部队在过去24小时内在其领空拦截了七架敌对无人机。他们补充说，伊朗的侵略还针对了国民警卫队的几个重要设施，造成多名人员受伤。他们的状况稳定。造成了严重的物质损失。爆炸物处理小组处理了14份报告。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 NYP : U.S. President Trump stated that U.S. warships are being reloaded with “the best ammunition” and “the best weapons ever made” in preparation for a possible resumption of strikes on Iran if peace talks in Pakistan fail. “We’re loading up the ships with the best weapons ever made, even at a higher level than we used to do a complete decimation,” he said, adding: “If we don’t have a deal, we will be using them, and we will be using them very effectively.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 《纽约邮报》：美国总统特朗普表示，美国军舰正在重新装载“最好的弹药”和“有史以来制造的最好的武器”，为如果巴基斯坦的和平谈判失败可能恢复对伊朗的打击做准备。“我们正在用有史以来制造的最好的武器装载船只，甚至比我们过去用来进行彻底摧毁的水平还要高，”他说，并补充道：“如果我们没有达成协议，我们将使用它们，而且我们将非常有效地使用它们。” @wfwitness

text: 🇸🇦 ⚡️ Saudi Regime Executes Citizen Over Childhood Protest Charges The Saudi regime executed Ali Hassan al-Subaiti on April 9, 2026, on fabricated “terrorism” charges dating back to when he was only 12 years old in the 2011-2012 Qatif protests. Arrested in 2017 at the age of 18 while seeking a driver’s license, he suffered 8.5 years of detention, torture, solitary confinement, and denial of legal defense. Saudi claims of joining a foreign terrorist group came with zero public proof - no documents, videos, or evidence of any kind. Rights groups say it relied only on tortured confessions from peaceful childhood protests. This is the 9th political execution in 2026 - just 8 days after Saud al-Faraj. At least 52 more remain at risk.
text_zh: 🇸🇦 ⚡️ 沙特政权因童年抗议指控处决公民：沙特政权于2026年4月9日处决了阿里·哈桑·阿尔-苏拜蒂，罪名是捏造的“恐怖主义”指控，这些指控可追溯到他在2011-2012年卡提夫抗议活动时年仅12岁。他于2017年18岁时在申请驾照时被捕，遭受了8.5年的拘留、酷刑、单独监禁和剥夺法律辩护权。沙特声称他加入了外国恐怖组织，但没有任何公开证据——没有文件、视频或任何形式的证据。人权组织表示，这仅仅依赖于从和平的童年抗议中通过酷刑获得的供词。这是2026年的第9次政治处决——距离沙特·阿尔-法拉杰被处决仅8天。至少还有52人面临风险。

text: Gatherings increasing in Beirut over the Lebanese government's traitorous behavior over peace talks with Israel Even a 100 coming when the whole community is displaced is a feat in itself
text_zh: 贝鲁特因黎巴嫩政府在和平谈判中对以色列的叛国行为而聚集的人数不断增加。即使在整个社区流离失所的情况下，有100人聚集本身就是一项壮举

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱 The Lebanese General Directorate of State Security announces the death of 13 members as a result of the targeting of the Nabatieh Government Serail building. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Lebanese speaker of Parliament Nabih Berri contacted the leadership of the State Security apparatus to offer his condolences following the Israeli raid on Nabatieh. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱 黎巴嫩国家安全总局宣布，由于纳巴泰政府大楼遭到袭击，13名成员死亡。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 黎巴嫩议会议长纳比·贝里联系了国家安全机构领导层，在以色列袭击纳巴泰后表示哀悼。@wfwitness

text: With the clear failure of the Israeli attacks on Beirut to kill a single Hezbollah commander or to damage even 1% of Hezbullah's war efforts With the failure to kill even a cultural or a political official, the Israelis now want to justify that the attack in Beirut was to protect the Lebanese government from a Hezbullah coup Bro you don't even know Lebanon if you assume a coup is possible. You are murderers and coping by claiming a fake story about a coup https://x.com/i/status/2042629506192523509
text_zh: 鉴于以色列对贝鲁特的袭击明显未能杀死一名真主党指挥官，也未能破坏真主党1%的战争努力，鉴于未能杀死哪怕一名文化或政治官员，以色列人现在想证明贝鲁特的袭击是为了保护黎巴嫩政府免受真主党政变的影响。兄弟，如果你认为政变是可能的，那你根本不了解黎巴嫩。你们是杀人犯，通过编造关于政变的虚假故事来应对。https://x.com/i/status/2042629506192523509
